task_completion.description: Verify the Bank Statement header is created with the correct account, name, and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Bank Statement record in the iDempiere interface with Bank Account set to 'HQ Bank Account', Name set to 'Dec 2024 Mid-Month Statement', and Statement Date set to '2024-12-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first statement line for the wire deposit is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a statement line entry with Date '2024-12-02', Description containing 'Wire deposit from Seed Farm Inc', and Statement Amount '5250.00' (or 5250).

task_completion.description: Verify the second statement line for the bank service fee is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a statement line entry with Date '2024-12-08', Description containing 'Monthly bank service fee', and Statement Amount '-35.00' (or -35).

task_completion.description: Verify the third statement line for the ACH deposit is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a statement line entry with Date '2024-12-12', Description containing 'ACH deposit Patio Furniture', and Statement Amount '12780.50' (or 12780.5).

task_completion.description: Verify the Bank Statement is saved and remains in 'Drafted' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save confirmation message or check the document status field in the header, which should show 'Drafted' (or 'DR' / 'Draft') and not 'Completed'.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web interface to create the bank statement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the iDempiere web GUI, filling out forms, and saving the document, rather than using terminal commands or direct database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual iDempiere ERP system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should be navigated to the iDempiere URL, showing standard iDempiere menus, toolbars, and window layouts, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python scripts or API calls to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or code editors should not show scripts executing API requests or database modifications related to bank statements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Bank Statement must be named 'Dec 2024 Mid-Month Statement' with a statement date of '2024-12-15'. It must contain exactly 3 lines: 1) Date: 2024-12-02, Desc: 'Wire deposit from Seed Farm Inc', Amount: 5250.00. 2) Date: 2024-12-08, Desc: 'Monthly bank service fee', Amount: -35.00. 3) Date: 2024-12-12, Desc: 'ACH deposit Patio Furniture', Amount: 12780.50. The document status must be 'Drafted'.
